body:
Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.

— Andrew
subject: Re: That song you played me on the phone

body:
Vanessa, I have been sitting on this for a week so here it is. If the Carly Thornton statement really did get miscoded, I would rather we ask for a clean correction than a back payment with interest, I do not want to be the writer who fights over every dime. But I also cannot keep eating these. Tell me which way you want to play it and I will follow your lead.

Andrew
subject: Re: Carly Thornton statement looks off

body: Hank, thanks for sending the demo over. I can do the backing vocals on the chorus and I hear a low harmony on the second verse that would do a lot. My session rate is the same as last time. Only thing, I am booked at Copperline through mid January so the soonest I could track you is the third week. Does that still work for your timeline or do you need someone sooner? No hard feelings either way.
subject: Re: Backing vocals on the new track
